feed.title: Upal Mahbub
feed.subtitle: Upal Mahbub, PhD — Staff Machine Learning Engineer at Qualcomm, San Diego. Building hardware-efficient deep learning algorithms for extended-reality (XR). Senior Member IEEE; Chair, IEEE San Diego Section; Chair, IEEE Computer Society San Diego Chapter.

entry.title: My Notes on Wordpress
entry.summary: My blog on wordpress. Will try to be more regular.
